features: Got2b Glued Hairspray delivers extreme hold and frizz control, making it perfect for bold styles that last all day. Also known as Got to be Glued Hairspray.
Eco Styler Gel provides maximum hold for sleek styles and defined curls. Ideal as a styling gel for curly hair or slicking back buns and taming flyaways.
3 Pcs Slick Back Hair Brush Set features an Edge Brush, Bristle Brush, and Rat Tail Comb for precision styling, sleek finishes, and effortless edge control.
This bundle features Edge Control Gel for Afro Hair, ensuring smooth edges, taming frizz, and works well as Styling Gel for Curly Hair for flawless results.
Perfect for daily use, this bundle helps achieve salon-quality results at home with Got2b Hairspray, Eco Styler Gel, and versatile styling tools.
description: Product description Elevate your hairstyling routine with this comprehensive Hair Styling Bundle featuring three essential products: Got2b Glued Hairspray 300ml, Eco Styler Olive Oil Gel 236ml, and a 3 Pcs Slick Back Hair Brush Set. This bundle is perfect for anyone who wants to achieve bold, sleek, and long-lasting styles effortlessly. The Got2b Glued Hairspray, also known as Got to be Glued Hairspray, offers an extreme freeze effect with ultra-strong hold, ensuring your hairstyle remains intact throughout the day. Whether you're creating dramatic looks, taming flyaways, or sculpting edgy styles, this hairspray provides the ultimate support. Its fast-drying formula locks in your style without leaving any sticky residue while delivering excellent frizz control. This makes it ideal for any weather conditions, keeping your hair smooth and in place. The bundle also includes Eco Styler Gel, which provides a maximum hold while keeping your hair moisturized and frizz-free. Perfect as an eco gel for curly hair, this alcohol-free formula is infused with pure olive oil, giving your hair shine and definition without flaking. Whether you're defining curls, slicking back buns, or taming edges, this styling gel is versatile for all hair types. Completing the bundle is the 3 Pcs Slick Back Hair Brush Set, featuring an Edge Brush, Bristle Brush, and Rat Tail Comb for precision styling. The brushes and comb help you create sleek ponytails, smooth flyaways, and perfect edge control, ensuring salon-quality results from the comfort of your home. This bundle, which combines the power of Got2b Hairspray, Eco Gel, and premium styling tools, is perfect for everyday use or special occasions when you need your style to last all day. Ingredients Got2B: Dimethyl Ether, Alcohol denat, Aqua, Octyl acrylamide/Acrylates/Butylaminoethyl Methacrylate Copolymer, Aminomethyl Propanol, Parfum. Eco Olive Oil Gel: Water (Aqua), Carbomer, Hydrolyzed Wheat Protein, Glycerine, Amino-2-Methyl-1-Propanol, Sodium Hydroxymethylglycinate, Polysorbate 20, Tetrasodium Edta, Fragrance (Perfume), C1 19140 Yellow 5. Directions Got2B: Prepare Your Hair: Start with dry, styled hair. Shake Can Well: Before use, shake the canister to ensure the formula is well mixed. Apply from a Distance: Hold the can 10-12 inches away from your hair and spray evenly to set your style. Style and Freeze: For maximum hold, apply more product as needed to achieve your desired look. Allow to Dry: Let the hairspray dry completely for a long-lasting, freeze effect. Use Got2b Glued Hairspray, Blasting Freeze Spray to keep your hair in place and ensure your style remains flawless throughout the day. Eco Olive Oil Gel: Prep Your Hair: Start with clean, damp, or dry hair. Apply the Gel: Scoop a small amount of the gel onto your fingertips. Rub your hands together to evenly distribute the product. Work Through Hair: Apply the gel to your hair, focusing on the areas where you want hold or definition. For curly or wavy hair, scrunch the gel into the hair to define curls. For sleek styles, smooth the gel over the hair and brush through for a smooth finish. Style as Desired: Use a comb, brush, or your fingers to style your hair as desired—whether it’s defining curls, slicking back a ponytail, or taming edges. Allow to Set: Let the gel air-dry or use a blow dryer with a diffuser for faster drying. Safety Warning For external use only. Keep out of reach of children. Keep away from direct head or naked flame. See more
